title: Theresa Brogan
compiled_truth: Theresa Brogan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-14), Theresa Brogan sent 12 and received 146 emails, totalling 158 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (11), [Sheila Glover](people/sheila-glover) (8), [Cassandra Schultz](people/cassandra-schultz) (6), [Cheryl Nelson](people/cheryl-nelson) (5), [John Greene](people/john-greene) (5).
